findings.description: Off-by-one in range_sum: uses range(n), so the upper bound n is never summed.
findings.fix: Sum range(n + 1) so the inclusive upper bound is counted.
findings.diff:
--- a/calc.py
+++ b/calc.py
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def range_sum(n):
-    return sum(range(n))
+    return sum(range(n + 1))
